pass_summaries.summary: Resolved the Chapter 11 to Chapter 12 clock handoff, clarified the Kreuzfeld courier failure as a live parallel pressure, reconfigured Damian's recognition around a new documentary trigger with a single deferment choice, differentiated Becky's care beat, and brought the chapter to 5010 words while preserving the planned ending state.

Single finding addressed. Becky's terrace confession was revised from composed thesis-speech into halting, specific, trail-off delivery consistent with her style-bible private register (indirect about feelings, trails off when vulnerable, self-corrects from performance to honesty). The three required facts -- Marc wanted access, Becky feels unseen, Anya is trusted -- are preserved and now land through concrete anecdotes (documentary pitch, orchid card, Tuesday-night habits) and unfinished lines rather than through polished generalizations. Profanity added ('asshole') consistent with Becky's moderate-high private profile. Contraction level maintained at high throughout. No structural, continuity, or heading-contract changes.

Revised Chapter 12's opening gala material toward tighter Anya-filtered comedy and tightened the terrace confession aftermath so Anya's telepathy-guilt lands through memory, pressure, and bodily response rather than narrator explanation.
